preferred_name: Connection facilities of transfer switching equipment

preferred_name_ml.en: Connection facilities of transfer switching equipment
preferred_name_ml.fr: Eléments de raccordement du matériel de connexion de transfert
preferred_name_ml.zh: 转换开关电器模块的连接件

definition: terminals, screws or other parts, used for the electrical connection of conductors of external circuits of the transfer switching equipment

definition_ml.en: terminals, screws or other parts, used for the electrical connection of conductors of external circuits of the transfer switching equipment
definition_ml.fr: bornes, vis et autres pièces, utilisées pour le raccordement électrique aux conducteurs des circuits externes du matériel de connexion de transfert
definition_ml.de: Anschlussklemmen, Schrauben oder andere Teile, die für den elektrischen Anschluss von Leitern externer Stromkreise des Netzumschalters verwendet werden
definition_ml.zh: 用于转换开关电器外部电路导体电气连接的端子、螺钉或其他零件
